Vendored third-party headers. Full attribution and licenses: ../THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md.

DIII_API.h - vendored verbatim from JerryYOJ/Dynamic-Inventory-Icon-Injector-SKSE
(GPL-3.0), api/DIII_API.h. This header is why the repository is licensed GPL-3.0.
A dual-license request to the author is worth sending; if ever granted (or the
~25-line interface is clean-room rewritten), a permissive relicense becomes possible.

FUCK_API.h - vendored from FLICK by Fuzzles (Nexus 181603). Declares the FUCK.dll
C-ABI; binds at runtime via GetModuleHandle/RequestFUCK, with no object code linked.
The header carries no separate license notice and is treated as GPL-3.0, consistent
with the FLICK project. It references Dear ImGui types (MIT), pulled in via vcpkg.
